title: 9 more audit fixes — Edit Profile bio safe, [mshare] renders, uploads unstuck
notes: DATA LOSS FIX: Edit Profile dialog now deep-merges into your bio (was wiping cover/location/notif prefs every time you tapped Save — same class of bug as the v3.27 Save All fix, missed in that pass)
FIX: [mshare] moment shares now render as a clickable 'Shared a moment' card in chat + inbox (was showing raw '[mshare]https://...' text)
FIX: Image and video upload spinners no longer stick forever on bucket misconfig or network error
FIX: Sign-out now wipes per-user caches (convos, profile, avatar, coins, saved posts) — next user signing in on the same device no longer sees previous user's data flash
FIX: Save All now persists timezone (was missing from the bio.location write, breaking cross-device sync)
FIX: 'Last seen' now updates immediately when you return to the app (was waiting up to 60s)
POLISH: 11 more raw alert(...) calls in HomeScreen replaced with toasts (errors no longer block the JS thread)
FIX: Inbox pull-to-refresh now reads the correct scroll position (was always firing because outer flex container has no scroll)
FIX: Image upload error no longer flashes broken-image icon (blob URL revoke deferred until after the render commits)
